title: ctenitis microtricha
intro: Ctenitis microtricha, also known as the Microtriche fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The Microtriche fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
